titleStmt.title: SII 31.145: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 145. (A.R. No. B 102 of 1938.) ŚRĪRANGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Garuḍamaṇḍapa in the V Prākāra of the Śrī Ranganātha temple.
This is dated in Śaka 1596, Ānanda, Śravaṇa, ba. 5, Tuesday, (Bhaumavāsara) Aśvani nakshtra corresponding to August 11, Tuesday 1674 A.D. f.d.t. 77.

It registers a gift of the village Vūkkakuḍi situated in Tiruvālūruvanita in Chōḷadēśa and also yielding 600 rēkhagaduyāna for maintaining the food offering daily (the quantity of each raw food items mentioned) to the god Ashṭbhuja Gōpalakṛishṇa consecrated on the northen side of the Viṭṭhalēśvara shrine in the temple complex of śrī Raṇganātha at Tiruvaraṅgam by Chinna Bommanāyaka and the same deposited in the śribhaṇḍāramu of the temple.
(Published in South Indaia Inscription Volume XXIV. Ins. No. 550, p. 532.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī śakābdha 1596 yiṁdumī
dacellēṭi Ānaṁdanāma saṁvatsaraṁ śrāvaṇa bahuḷa 5
bhābhauvu(ma) vāsaraṁ Aśvani nakṣatraṁ kūḍina śubhadinamaṁdu
dakṣiṇagaṭu pāṁḍikulādhaśvavaḷanāḍu nityōtyavadhīvi
dhavaḷanāḍu tiruvaraṁggaṁ tirupati śrīraṁgganādhasvā
mi śrīdhaṁḍāranaku śrīmatuviśvanādhanāyani cō
kkanādhanāyanayyavāri rājyāṁggānuṁḍḍē maḍutalō madhuralō
nuṁḍē ciṁnnaboṁmmanāyuḍu sāṣṭāṁga daṁḍaṁ sama
ppiṁcci śrīraṁganāthasvāmi dēvarānakuṁgrāmaṁ vērcci
na śilāśāsanaṁ vrāśina kramaḥ . saṁnnidhividhi bacu
varaṇaṁlō kūratāḷvārāvāri kōvilaku vuttaraṁ viṭhṭha
lēśvaruni dēvaḷānaku dakṣiṇamadhyē nēnu kaṭṭiṁccina pratiṣṭa
sēsina Aṣṭabhujaṁ śrīgōpāḷakriṣṇadēvaḷānaku Ā
ragiṁppukrayaṁ 1 ki biyyaṁ kuṁccaṁ 50 kra
yaṁga pesalu kuṁccaṁ r minumula kuṁ
ccaṁ 4 kir bellaṁ ma 007 kir be camarugi
kir vṭṭa ceraku ka 1 miriyālu ptakir
jīlakarrapaṁki 8 meṁttipaṁ kir yeṁdalaṁ (Ēṁdulaṁ) paṁ kir
yāla ki phalaṁ ki r ciṁtapaṁdluphalālu kir
da lu yina kūragāyalu r divya camuru r 1
Aṁttu dinaṁki 1 ki ga 11 lekha nelaki 50 lekha saṁvva
tsaraṁ ki ga 600 grāmaṁ cērcinadi cōla dēśāna
tiruvāḷūru vaṇitāna vūkkakuḍi grāmaṁ rekhaga 600 .
yīkramamunaku yīdēvaḷaṁmunnu yī dharmamuṁ
nnuvēdavyāsa bhaṭrayyagāruvārki samarpiṁcināraṁ
ganaka Ācaṁdrārkastāyulai putrapautra pāraṁparya
mu Anubhaviṁcu kōgalavāru vīripārśvaṁgānu
cērccinavi yīdēvaḷāna veṁcēśi vuṁḍēvi gataṁ dajīva
rāyaṁḍi kōvilalō kaṁdāḷa Annagāri pārśvamaivunna
tōṁdaraḍippoḍi Āḷvārunu nēnu Aḍiki tīsukunnānu
ganaka Āḷvāru tirunakṣata kaṭlaku dōśēlu 300 ki 5 Āva
ḍalu 00 ki ga 5 r 4 Atirasālu ki ga 8 r 4 [ ] mi
dikuṁcāla yirasalu ki taḷige vaṁtu taḷigelu kī
ga 6 rokhkakrayānaku ga 5 nārikēḷālu 10 kir ṁceruku
lu 200 kir 5 Ariṁṭi paṁḍu 400 kir 4 tamalapākulu ṁ na
gaṁdhapiḷla 40 ki ga Aṁtuga 445 Āḷvāru sannidhi
veṁcērēṭaṁduku tiruvadyena Ūccavaṁ dinālu 0 dīpāvaḷi [Ugā]
di dinālu Aṁtu dinālu ki śrīpādaṁ tākuvāriki ga 5
Aṁtu r 49 kigrāmālu ki lekha 800 ki mūladāna
ku raṁganāyakulu veṁcēḷeṭeṁduku prayaṁ 1 50 4 r
Aṭṭabhujaṁ gōpālakṛṣṇani Āragiṁpuku rū ga 689 śi
lāśāsanaṁ vrāśinadi staḷaṁ saṁprati rāmappavrālu .
Digital edition of SII 31.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
